content:
Just wanted to let everyone know I've started pushing updates into https://github.com/lukewilliamboswell/roc-awesome again -- now we have multiple platforms, packages, and tools coming online with the new zig compiler I've effectively made the switch and am no longer tracking legacy roc things.

If you have a package or platform and would like it included please make a PR or let me know.

Looking forward to seeing what everyone is building with Roc :grinning_face_with_smiling_eyes:
